# Medigize - Premium Global Medical Travel

Medigize is a leading platform connecting patients with elite medical specialists and clinics worldwide. We bridge the gap in global healthcare by providing seamless travel logistics, specialist matching, and post-care support.

## Core Services
- **Specialist Matching**: Connection to the top 1% of surgeons and doctors globally.
- **Travel Logistics**: Full coordination of flights, medical visas, and premium accommodation.
- **Post-Care Support**: Continuous monitoring and rehabilitation coordination in the patient's home country.

## Key Destinations
- Turkey (Cosmetic, Dental, Cardiac)
- Germany (Oncology, Orthopedics)
- South Korea (Dermatology, Plastic Surgery)
- Thailand (Wellness, Specialized surgeries)

## Important Links
- [Specialties](https://medigize.com/specialties)
- [How it Works](https://medigize.com/how-it-works)
- [Request a Consultation](https://medigize.com/get-started)

## Organization Details
- **Company**: Medigize Global
- **Mission**: To provide healthcare without boundaries through transparency and quality.
- **Year Founded**: 2026
